creator: freebsdml@marino.st
text:
The following ports should be deleted:

lang/gnat-doc-html
lang/gnat-doc-info
lang/gnat-doc-ps
lang/gnat-doc-texi
lang/gnat-doc-txt

Reason:
They build documentation for GNAT 3.15p which was removed from the ports tree over 5 years ago.  These ports have been obsolete since Nov 2005.

Freshports indicates there are no maintainers for these ports.

Fix: 

Delete the five ports.  :)
How-To-Repeat: n/a
